entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used as a food staple in sub-Saharan Africa.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region where sorghum yields are reduced by Striga.

entities.name: STRIGA
entities.description: A parasitic plant, also known as witchweed, that reduces sorghum yields.

entities.name: SEQUENCING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Modern technologies used to manage the Striga parasite.

entities.name: RHIZOTRONS
entities.description: Laboratory assays used to screen sorghum diversity panels for Striga resistance.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: A method used to elucidate genetic loci underlying Striga resistance.

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist infection and development of the Striga parasite.

entities.name: MECHANICAL BARRIERS
entities.description: A resistance mechanism that blocks the entry of the Striga parasite.

entities.name: HYPERSENSITIVE REACTION
entities.description: A resistance mechanism that interferes with the development of the Striga parasite.

entities.name: VASCULAR CONNECTIONS
entities.description: The connections between the parasite and host that are blocked in resistant sorghum.

entities.name: PLEIOTROPIC DRUG RESISTANCE PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins that transport resistance molecules and underpin Striga resistance.

entities.name: XYLANASE INHIBITORS
entities.description: Proteins involved in cell wall fortification and underpinning Striga resistance.

entities.name: ETHYLENE RESPONSE FACTORS
entities.description: Hormonal regulators of resistance response underpinning Striga resistance.

entities.name: CELL WALL FORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of strengthening cell walls to prevent parasite entry.
